message:
ci: Improve GitHub Actions workflows with caching and releases

- CI workflow: Add uv dependency caching for faster builds (was missing)
- Release workflow: Add GitHub Release creation with auto-generated notes
  - Renamed from "Release Docker Image" to "Release"
  - Changed contents permission from read to write for release creation
  - Detects pre-releases from tag names containing hyphens (e.g., v1.0.0-beta)
- Nightly/Release workflows: Add allow-prereleases: true for Python 3.14

These changes ensure:
1. Faster CI runs through proper dependency caching
2. Proper GitHub Releases are created alongside Docker image publishing
3. Consistent Python 3.14 prerelease handling across all workflows

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -32,6 +32,16 @@ jobs:
           echo "$HOME/.local/bin" >> $GITHUB_PATH
           uv --version
 
+      - name: Cache uv dependencies
+        uses: actions/cache@v4
+        with:
+          path: |
+            ~/.cache/uv
+            .venv
+          key: ci-uv-${{ runner.os }}-${{ hashFiles('pyproject.toml', 'uv.lock') }}
+          restore-keys: |
+            ci-uv-${{ runner.os }}-
+
       - name: Sync dependencies
         shell: bash
         run: |

@@ -15,6 +15,7 @@ jobs:
         uses: actions/setup-python@v5
         with:
           python-version: '3.14'
+          allow-prereleases: true
       - name: Install uv
         run: curl -Ls https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh
       - name: Add uv to PATH

@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@
-name: Release Docker Image
+name: Release
 
 on:
   push:
@@ -9,7 +9,7 @@ jobs:
   build-and-push:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     permissions:
-      contents: read
+      contents: write
       packages: write
     steps:
       - name: Checkout
@@ -19,6 +19,7 @@ jobs:
         uses: actions/setup-python@v5
         with:
           python-version: '3.14'
+          allow-prereleases: true
 
       - name: Install uv
         run: curl -Ls https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh
@@ -78,3 +79,12 @@ jobs:
           cache-from: type=gha
           cache-to: type=gha,mode=max
 
+      - name: Create GitHub Release
+        uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v2
+        with:
+          generate_release_notes: true
+          draft: false
+          prerelease: ${{ contains(github.ref_name, '-') }}
+        env:
+          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
+
